message:
chore: remove 70 tracked ephemeral files now covered by .gitignore

These files (test output, UBS/clippy reports, fuse logs, git diffs,
rch probe results, etc.) were committed before the .gitignore was
expanded to cover agent-generated scratch output. They have been
cleaned from the working tree and are now properly ignored.

Includes: clippy_pedantic.txt, ffs-core-errors.txt, rust-bug-scan.txt,
unwraps.txt, fuse_out*.txt, *-ubs.jsonl, git_log_output.txt,
rch_test*.txt, and ~50 other scratch files totaling ~17k lines
of ephemeral content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
